# config: Default configuration, use cdk --context config=XYZ to change

prod.# account: Account id, set to null if using AWS credentials
prod.# region: Deployment Region, set to null if using AWS CLI settings
# edge_region: Region for the Global Review Edge to be deployed.
Must be a region that Lambda @ Edge can be deployed in.
Note: This is AWS Partition specific. Keep it as us-east-1 for the 'aws' partition.
prod.# require_mfa: Whether to require Cognito User Pool users to requre Multi-Factor Authentication
prod.# run_cdk_nag: run CDK nag best practices check
